title: Very beautiful landscape
description: Start a new adventure in this beautiful world and discover many new landscapes that you may have never seen before.
body:
![Very beautiful landscape](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1af4851b0119dfb056085df6b58e9c26467a1df.png)


Start traveling in a new world, in which there are many landscapes, you will like it, survive and play in your world, create and enjoy the game with this modpack, which will improve your gameplay a little, the modpack adds many new biomes that are interesting to explore and structures that will also be interesting to search for and explore, the world has become a little more alive, for example, new mobs that walk around the world, a little bit of new weapons and armor have been added so that the player can find for himself the very thing that he will find or make, just play and enjoy the game


**This is a regular modpack, I didn't touch the mods' configs, I didn't change anything, I just added mods and that's it.(
And changing the Minecraft menu remains the same as changing the config?)**

This mod pack is made for adventure in the world of minecraft, and with this mod pack it will become more interesting.

**What's in the modpack**

100+ new biomes

30+ of new structures

Lots of new mobs

And many different details during the game

**100+ MODS**

**In the screenshots of the modpack, [Photon Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/photon-shader)**

**This modpack may have some bugs in structure generation, I haven't tested it myself for crashes and can't make any premature conclusions, but when I checked if any mod worked, my game never crashed.**

To feel all the beauty of the world, I recommend using shaders [Complementary Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) or [Photon Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/photon-shader)

![Scenery2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fb18e614cdb5515991051cf086819a5fc6b23ec_0.webp)

![Scenery3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04989716ba81c266bc543b73c4898a4d794ebb95_0.webp)

![Scenery4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8af2e1294df933046b93246537cd65ef864222d4_0.webp)

I highly recommend that you nostravite the mods in the config yourself to make a modpack for yourself
